content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.39%, Bank Nifty -1.50%, VIX +9.7% to 19.13 — broad-based risk-off with PSU Bank (-2.17%) and Metal (-2.06%) leading lower. FMCG/Pharma defensives outperforming. Energy mixed: ONGC at 52w high on Brent shock, but downstream/utilities under pressure (TATAPOWER -4.49%). With 10 existing positions already deployed (60% capital), priority is risk management on the book — trailing SLs on winners, watching CHENNPETRO/TATAPOWER reversal candles — not adding new entries into a -1.4% tape with VIX spiking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD — current SL 1029.88 is already at breakeven+ (entry 984), giving ~0.6% room below CMP 1036.20. Q4 beat thesis intact (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, dividend hike). No-op MODIFY avoided; values unchanged from stored. Keeping as HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating off April peak, -2.4% unrealized. SL at 119 is ~2.4% below CMP. Hedge against equity drawdown still valid in VIX-spiking tape. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7% unrealized, broke above 52w high (1445). SL at 1442 is at breakeven+entry, ~0.9% below CMP 1450.70 — appropriate trail-gap. Q4 beat (PAT +27%), defensive in selloff. No-op vs stored values; emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Organon deal momentum, +2.1% unrealized. SL at 1762 is at breakeven+, 0.7% below CMP 1771. Approaching original target 1810 (high today 1792). Values unchanged — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7% unrealized, near 52w high. SL at 478 is breakeven+, 0.7% below CMP 481.85 — trail-gap tight but appropriate given Q4 beat and dividend (5.25 final). Bearish engulfing on Apr-27 noted but Apr-28 reversed strongly. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY, +9.8% today on results. -1.4% unrealized but momentum strong post-print. SL at 195 = -2.5% (within max). Original SL stored intact; let the post-results move develop. Will revisit with TRAIL once it clears entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered at 2400, CMP 2404. SL 2410 sits ABOVE entry — that's a risk-management anomaly. Wait — re-reading: SL 2410 with CMP 2404 means stop is above CMP, which would trigger immediately. This appears to be a stale/incorrectly-stored SL field. Cannot tighten further (would loosen to set SL below CMP). Holding; if SL truly is 2410 and triggers, position closes. No MODIFY action available that engine would accept."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Brent at $120, ONGC pure upstream beneficiary. -0.3% unrealized after gap-up reversal today (high 307.45, now 301.20). SL at 290 = -3.7% from CMP. Bullish Marubozu on Apr-28; Q4 results pending May = binary risk window. Hold — within 3-session catalyst zone, will reassess; size is 5% of capital, acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "price": 441.05,
      "stop_loss": 425.00,
      "target": 470.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Today -4.49% reversal from 52w high zone (yesterday 461.80 → today 441.05). Q4 results May 12 — binary catalyst within 8 sessions, Q3 PAT was -25% YoY raising the bar. Power-cluster overhang acknowledged from prior playbook. Exit at small loss rather than ride into earnings overhang with weakening tape. -0.3% unrealized; clean exit better than stop-out at 425 (-3.6%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 45,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "price": 1116.60,
      "stop_loss": 1075.00,
      "target": 1200.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Massive intraday reversal: high 1159.70 → CMP 1116.60 (-3.7% off high, gave back most of +4.13% gap). OMC refinery price-freeze overhang flagged in research is a direct margin-cap risk. Single-asset (Manali) operational binary. Q4 already printed (record GRMs)—catalyst is behind, news flow now skews to overhang. Exit small loss; preserve capital ahead of weakening tape."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+ (1029.88 vs entry 984). Trail-gap 0.6% below CMP appropriate. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge in risk-off tape. SL 119 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1442 at breakeven+. Approaching ATH cluster. Will trail tighter only if it breaks 1466 decisively."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 at breakeven+. Near original target 1810; will book on reaching it."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 at breakeven+. Q4 beat, dividend catalyst, near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just-released Q4 +68% YoY; -1.4% intraday consolidation post-gap. Let position mature."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 2410 anomaly noted (above entry 2400 and ~at CMP). Cannot loosen via MODIFY. If it triggers, position closes flat — acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Brent thesis intact; Q4 May print is a watch — will tighten as date approaches. Current SL 290 acceptable for now."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 12 binary + Q3 weakness + intraday -4.49% reversal. Exit pre-emptively."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday reversal off high, OMC price-freeze overhang, Q4 catalyst behind us."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJFINANCE — guidance cut to 24-25% from 25-27% is the tell; sell-the-news; pass. BANDHANBNK already held, monitoring. RBLBANK — May 4 EGM is a binary; would need post-vote re-rating to enter. ITC/HINDUNILVR/BHARTIARTL — defensive candidates but with full deployment + risk-off tape, no entry today. TATACHEM Q4 board May 4 + bearish research = pass. SYNGENE bearish research (margin compression, client concentration) — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 60%, two EXITs (TATAPOWER, CHENNPETRO) free up ~₹100K, taking deployment to ~50%. Keeping cash buffer wide is appropriate given VIX +9.7% and 5-day rolling P&L -₹6,095 (PF 0.2x). No new entries today — discipline check: 3 of last 5 days have shown the failure pattern of stacking entries into weak tape. The book already has cluster representation in financials (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK), defensives (NESTLE, SUNPHARMA, GLENMARK, GOLDBEES), energy (ONGC, COALINDIA). Adding more correlated names today would compound risk, not diversify. Will re-evaluate new entries tomorrow once VIX spike resolves."
}
